description: Use this API to return two-winding transformer real parameters. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rval = xfrdat(ibus, jbus, ickt, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rval = xfrdat(ibus, jbus, ickt, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the transformer quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Winding one off-nominal turns ratio.
Winding two off-nominal turns ratio.
Winding one-phase shift angle in degrees.
Winding one ratio or angle upper limit.
Winding one ratio or angle lower limit.
Controlled quantity upper limit.
Controlled quantity lower limit.
Winding one ratio or angle step width.
Real component of load drop compensation impedance.
Reactive component of load drop compensation impedance.
Winding connection angle in degrees.
Winding one base MVA.
Winding one nominal voltage in kV.
Winding two nominal voltage in kV.
Conductance component of transformer magnetizing admittance in pu.
Susceptance component of transformer magnetizing admittance in pu.
Grounding resistance at the winding 1 bus.
Grounding reactance at the winding 1 bus.
Zero sequence leakage resistance connected to the winding 1 bus.
Zero sequence leakage reactance connected to the winding 1 bus.
Grounding resistance at the winding 2 bus.
Grounding reactance at the winding 1 bus.
Zero sequence leakage resistance connected to the winding 2 bus.
Zero sequence leakage reactance connected to the winding 2 bus.
Common neutral grounding resistance.
Common neutral grounding reactance.

error_codes.description: Sequence data not in case for STRING = ‘RGRND’, ‘XGRND’, ‘RGRND2’, ‘XGRND2’, ‘RG1’, ‘XG1’, ‘R01’, ‘X01’, ‘RG2’, ‘XG2’, ‘R02’, ‘X02’, ‘RNUTRL’ or ‘XNUTRL’; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
